name: Wand of Polymorph
description:
This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 of its charges to cast the [_polymorph_](#polymorph) spell (save DC 15) from it.

The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.
source_type_rarity: Wand, very rare (requires [attunement](#section-attunement) by a spellcaster)
